episode_theme: Arrival and first night - the house reveals its sentience

scenes.scene_purpose: Establish the house's violent history, create dread

beats.description: Young maid Sarah runs down basement stairs, candle flickering, pursued by heavy footsteps
beats.visual: Handheld chase, candle as only light source, shadows dancing on stone walls
beats.character_action: Sarah trips, turns to face pursuer, screams
beats.revelation: This basement has seen murder before

beats.description: Shadowed figure with meat cleaver, blood spray on stone walls
beats.visual: Silhouette only, no face shown, emphasize shadow on wall not gore
beats.character_action: Sarah's final scream cuts to silence, candle extinguishes
beats.revelation: The violence that cursed the house began here

beats.description: Pool of blood spreading across floor, seeping into cracks between stones
beats.visual: Slow push-in on blood, time-lapse of it spreading and drying into permanent stain
beats.revelation: This blood never washed away - it's still there 132 years later

beats.description: Smash cut to title: THE BLACKWOOD ESTATE - October 2025
beats.visual: Blood transforms into title typography, modern day begins

shots.description: Sarah fleeing down stairs into basement darkness
shots.lens_specs: moderate depth f/4, candle sharp foreground soft
shots.lighting: Single candle practical, bouncing with movement, deep shadows
shots.character_blocking: Sarah center descending left to right, killer shadow above

shots.description: Sarah on ground looking up at killer
shots.camera: 50mm low angle from floor, killer's POV
shots.lens_specs: shallow f/2.8, Sarah's terrified face sharp
shots.lighting: Candle on floor beside her, rim light from killer's candle above
shots.character_blocking: Sarah sprawled lower right, hands up defensive, killer looming

shots.description: Extreme close-up - blood spreading on stone
shots.lens_specs: shallow f/1.8, blood droplets sharp, stone texture visible
shots.lighting: Dying candle light, cool moonlight from small window
shots.character_blocking: No characters, blood pool center frame expanding

scenes.scene_title: ARRIVAL AT THE GATES - ELEANOR & MARCUS
scenes.scene_purpose: Introduce protagonists, establish house's imposing presence

dialogue.line: The gates... they're opening by themselves.
Probably motion sensor. Rich people love automation.
My EMF detector is going crazy. Marcus, we should leave.
We just got here. Besides, I need this story.

beats.description: Car headlights illuminate rusted iron gates with Blackwood crest - raven clutching dead roses
beats.visual: Crane down from gates to car, tungsten headlights cutting through blue dusk fog
beats.character_action: Eleanor stares up at mansion silhouette, Marcus checks rear mirror nervously
beats.revelation: The house is larger and more menacing than photos suggested

beats.description: Gates creak open on their own, no mechanism visible, invitation accepted
beats.visual: Wide shot - gates part slowly, car headlights revealing empty driveway beyond
beats.character_action: Eleanor whispers warning, Marcus forces skeptical laugh but grips wheel
beats.revelation: The house is aware and welcoming them in

beats.description: Long driveway lined with dead trees, mansion growing larger, single lit window like an eye
beats.visual: Dolly follow behind car, low angle making house loom, one amber window prominent
beats.character_action: Eleanor's EMF readings spike, nosebleed starts (first sign of her sensitivity)
beats.revelation: This isn't passive - it's actively watching

beats.description: Two other cars already parked - they're not alone
beats.visual: Park beside expensive sedan and old van, lights on in house
beats.character_action: Marcus grabs camera bag, Eleanor hesitates touching door handle
beats.revelation: The other guests are already inside

shots.camera: 24mm crane movement, descending from gate top to car level
shots.lens_specs: deep depth f/8, entire scene sharp
shots.lighting: Dusk blue hour, tungsten headlights, no moon yet
shots.character_blocking: Car center lower third, gates dominating upper frame
shots.reference_needed: Gate design, car model, mansion silhouette

shots.description: Interior car - Eleanor and Marcus react to gates opening
shots.camera: 50mm dual shot through windshield, dashboard mounted
shots.lens_specs: moderate depth f/4, faces sharp dashboard slightly soft
shots.lighting: Dashboard glow blue, headlights bouncing back from fog
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor right looking up/left, Marcus left focused forward
shots.reference_needed: Eleanor character reference, Marcus character reference

shots.lens_specs: shallow f/1.8, eyes sharp everything else soft bokeh
shots.lighting: Cool blue from window, warm dash glow from below
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor's face fills frame, eyes reflecting gate movement

shots.description: Following car up driveway - house growing larger
shots.camera: 35mm dolly follow from behind, low angle
shots.lighting: Headlights creating path, house window lit amber, trees silhouetted
shots.character_blocking: Car lower third, mansion dominating upper two-thirds

shots.description: EMF detector in Eleanor's hand - readings spiking
shots.lens_specs: shallow f/2, device sharp hand soft
shots.lighting: Device LED screen glow, ambient car interior

shots.camera: 24mm from house POV looking down at driveway
shots.lighting: Car headlights, porch lights from house, dusk fading
shots.character_blocking: Three cars arranged, Eleanor and Marcus exiting

scenes.scene_purpose: Gather full cast, establish dynamics, first supernatural event

dialogue.line: Welcome to Blackwood Estate. I'm Victoria Ashford, your host for the weekend.
Marcus Sterling, investigative journalist. Mind if I record?
Please don't. This is... private research.
Father Thomas Rhys. The Church sent me to assess the... situation.
Kenji Nakamura, architectural historian. This house is extraordinary.
Eleanor Vance. Paranormal researcher. And something is very wrong here.
Wine? You'll all need it. The house... has expectations.
Oh god... the portraits. They're all looking at ME.

beats.description: Victoria greets arrivals at base of grand staircase, elegant but visibly tense
beats.visual: Symmetrical framing, Victoria centered, dual staircases framing her
beats.character_action: Victoria's practiced welcome masks trembling hands, avoids looking at portraits
beats.revelation: The host is terrified of her own house

beats.description: Each guest introduces themselves, hidden agendas clash
beats.visual: Rotating focus as each speaks, portraits visible in background
beats.character_action: Marcus suspicious and recording mentally, Father Rhys touches rosary, Kenji photographs everything, Eleanor growing pale
beats.revelation: Everyone has a secret reason for being here

beats.description: Chandelier begins swinging violently, all portrait eyes shift to Eleanor
beats.visual: Sudden chaos - candles flicker, temperature drops visible in breath
beats.character_action: Eleanor gasps, nosebleed starts, Father Rhys begins Latin prayer, Marcus tries to rationalize
beats.revelation: The house recognizes Eleanor as the psychic - she's the primary target

beats.description: Victoria admits truth - everyone invited for a reason, house feeds on fear
beats.visual: Tight group shot, all looking at Victoria, chandelier still swaying above
beats.character_action: Victoria breaks down, confesses her family's curse, begs them to leave tonight
beats.revelation: This wasn't a research invitation - it's a trap set by the house itself

shots.camera: 24mm from balcony level, high angle looking down
shots.lens_specs: deep depth f/8, entire space sharp
shots.lighting: Chandelier key light, wall sconces fill, window moonlight
shots.character_blocking: Victoria at staircase base center, guests in semicircle facing her

shots.camera: 50mm chest-level, slight push in as she speaks
shots.lens_specs: moderate depth f/4, portraits slightly soft but visible
shots.lighting: Warm sconce uplight on face, cool window backlight
shots.character_blocking: Victoria center, two portraits flanking, eyes painted to seem watching

shots.lens_specs: shallow f/1.8, blood droplet sharp background soft
shots.lighting: Horror lighting - overhead creating shadows under eyes
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor touching nose, blood on fingertips, eyes wide at portraits
shots.reference_needed: Eleanor reference - terror expression, blood practical

shots.lighting: Side light from window, shadows on praying hands
shots.character_blocking: Father Rhys right third, rosary in hands, lips moving

shots.camera: 24mm from floor looking up, dutch angle
shots.lighting: Chandelier swinging creating moving shadows, candles flickering
shots.character_blocking: All five guests visible scattered, looking up
Portrait only, eyes seeming to track
shots.reference_needed: Portrait art with movable eyes VFX
